name: Verify G+ (General Ability)
description: A comprehensive cognitive ability test measuring numerical, deductive, and inductive reasoning. Assesses a candidate's general mental ability and potential to learn, adapt, and solve problems in the workplace.

name: Verify Numerical Reasoning
description: Measures the ability to make correct decisions or inferences from numerical data. Tests interpretation of graphs, charts, tables, and statistical data.

name: Verify Verbal Reasoning
description: Measures the ability to evaluate the logic of various kinds of arguments and statements. Tests comprehension, critical evaluation, and interpretation of written information.

name: Verify Inductive Reasoning
description: Measures the ability to draw inferences and understand relationships between various concepts independent of acquired knowledge. Uses abstract figures and patterns.

name: Verify Deductive Reasoning
description: Measures the ability to draw logical conclusions from information provided, identify strengths and weaknesses of arguments, and complete scenarios using incomplete information.

name: Verify Mechanical Comprehension
description: Measures understanding of basic mechanical and physical principles. Tests knowledge of forces, pulleys, gears, levers, and basic physics concepts relevant to technical roles.

name: Verify Checking
description: Measures the ability to check and compare information quickly and accurately. Tests attention to detail through comparison of codes, data entries, and text.

name: Verify Calculation
description: Measures the ability to perform basic arithmetic operations including addition, subtraction, multiplication, division, percentages, and fractions.

name: OPQ32 (Occupational Personality Questionnaire)
description: SHL's flagship personality assessment that provides a detailed profile of an individual's preferred behavioral style at work. Measures 32 personality characteristics across three domains: Relationships with People, Thinking Style, and Feelings and Emotions.

name: OPQ32r (OPQ Ipsative)
description: The ipsative (forced-choice) version of the OPQ32, providing a detailed personality profile for work contexts. Candidates choose between statements that are equally desirable.

name: Motivation Questionnaire (MQ)
description: Measures factors that increase or decrease an individual's motivation at work. Identifies what energizes or de-energizes a candidate across 18 dimensions of motivation.

name: Universal Competency Framework (UCF) SJT
description: A Situational Judgement Test based on SHL's Universal Competency Framework. Presents realistic workplace scenarios to assess how candidates would handle common work situations.

name: Graduate Situational Judgement Test
description: Designed specifically for graduate-level hiring. Assesses judgement and decision-making in workplace scenarios typical for early-career professionals.

name: Manager Situational Judgement Test
description: Assesses managerial and leadership potential through realistic management scenarios. Evaluates decision-making, people management, and leadership judgement.

name: Java 8 New
description: Measures proficiency in Java 8 programming including lambda expressions, streams API, functional interfaces, and core Java concepts like OOP, collections, and exception handling.

name: Python 3.x
description: Assesses Python 3.x programming skills including data types, control structures, functions, modules, file handling, OOP, and standard library usage.

name: JavaScript
description: Measures JavaScript programming knowledge including ES6+ features, DOM manipulation, closures, promises, async/await, and web development fundamentals.

name: C# .NET
description: Assesses C# and .NET framework skills including OOP concepts, LINQ, async programming, exception handling, and .NET framework components.

name: C++
description: Measures C++ programming skills including memory management, pointers, templates, STL, OOP, and system-level programming concepts.

name: SQL (Structured Query Language)
description: Measures SQL proficiency including SELECT queries, JOINs, GROUP BY, subqueries, database design, normalization, and data manipulation (DML/DDL).

name: HTML/CSS
description: Assesses knowledge of HTML5 and CSS3 including semantic markup, responsive design, flexbox, grid layout, accessibility, and modern web standards.

name: React.js
description: Measures React.js development skills including components, state management, hooks, JSX, virtual DOM, lifecycle methods, and modern React patterns.

name: Angular
description: Assesses Angular framework knowledge including TypeScript, components, services, dependency injection, routing, RxJS, and Angular CLI.

name: Node.js
description: Measures Node.js backend development skills including event-driven architecture, Express.js, asynchronous patterns, npm, REST APIs, and middleware.

name: AWS Cloud Practitioner
description: Assesses foundational knowledge of AWS cloud services including EC2, S3, Lambda, IAM, VPC, and cloud architecture concepts.

name: Microsoft Azure
description: Measures knowledge of Microsoft Azure cloud platform including compute, storage, networking, identity management, and Azure services.

name: Data Science
description: Assesses data science competency including statistics, machine learning algorithms, data wrangling, feature engineering, model evaluation, and Python/R for analytics.

name: Machine Learning
description: Measures understanding of machine learning concepts including supervised/unsupervised learning, neural networks, model evaluation, feature engineering, and ML frameworks.

name: DevOps
description: Assesses DevOps practices including CI/CD pipelines, containerization (Docker), orchestration (Kubernetes), infrastructure as code, monitoring, and version control.

name: Cybersecurity
description: Measures cybersecurity knowledge including network security, encryption, threat analysis, vulnerability assessment, incident response, and security frameworks.

name: Agile Software Development
description: Assesses understanding of Agile methodologies including Scrum, Kanban, sprint planning, user stories, retrospectives, and iterative development practices.

name: Microsoft Excel
description: Measures proficiency in Microsoft Excel including formulas, functions, pivot tables, data visualization, VLOOKUP, conditional formatting, and data analysis.

name: Microsoft Word
description: Assesses Microsoft Word skills including document formatting, styles, tables, mail merge, headers/footers, and advanced document features.

name: Microsoft PowerPoint
description: Measures skills in creating professional presentations including slide design, animations, transitions, master slides, and multimedia integration.

name: Typing Speed and Accuracy
description: Measures typing speed (words per minute) and accuracy. Assesses ability to type quickly and correctly from dictated or displayed text.

name: English Language Proficiency
description: Assesses English language skills including grammar, vocabulary, reading comprehension, and written communication ability.

name: Contact Center Agent Simulation
description: A realistic work simulation for contact center roles. Measures multitasking, customer service skills, data entry accuracy, and ability to handle customer interactions while navigating systems.

name: Sales Representative Simulation
description: A work simulation measuring sales competency including prospecting, needs analysis, objection handling, closing, and customer relationship management.

name: Administrative Assistant Simulation
description: Simulates typical administrative tasks including email management, scheduling, document organization, priority management, and office communication.

name: Manager In-Tray Exercise
description: An in-tray/in-basket exercise simulating a manager's workload. Assesses prioritization, delegation, decision-making, and strategic thinking through realistic business scenarios.

name: Financial Analyst Assessment
description: Assesses financial analysis skills including financial statement interpretation, ratio analysis, budgeting, forecasting, and financial modeling fundamentals.

name: Bookkeeping & Accounting
description: Measures knowledge of bookkeeping principles including double-entry accounting, journal entries, ledgers, trial balance, and basic financial statements.

name: Customer Service Assessment
description: Assesses customer service aptitude including empathy, conflict resolution, communication skills, patience, and ability to handle customer complaints effectively.

name: Sales Aptitude Assessment
description: Measures natural sales ability and potential including persuasion, resilience, competitiveness, relationship building, and achievement orientation.

name: Leadership Assessment
description: Comprehensive leadership potential assessment evaluating strategic thinking, people development, change management, results orientation, and emotional intelligence.

name: Teamwork Assessment
description: Evaluates a candidate's teamwork and collaboration skills including communication, cooperation, conflict management, and contribution to team goals.

name: Workplace Safety Assessment
description: Assesses safety awareness and attitudes in the workplace including hazard recognition, safety protocol compliance, and risk assessment.

name: Emotional Intelligence Assessment
description: Measures emotional intelligence competencies including self-awareness, self-regulation, empathy, social skills, and emotional management in the workplace.

name: Critical Thinking Assessment
description: Measures critical thinking ability including argument evaluation, assumption identification, logical reasoning, and evidence-based decision making.

name: Coding Simulation - Full Stack
description: A hands-on coding simulation assessing full-stack development skills. Candidates write actual code for front-end, back-end, and database tasks in a realistic development environment.

name: Coding Simulation - Backend
description: A hands-on backend coding simulation. Candidates implement APIs, data processing logic, and server-side functionality in their preferred language.

name: Coding Simulation - Data Engineering
description: Assesses data engineering skills through practical tasks including ETL pipelines, data transformation, SQL queries, and data quality validation.

name: Project Management Assessment
description: Assesses project management knowledge and skills including planning, scheduling, risk management, stakeholder management, and agile/waterfall methodologies.

name: Digital Marketing
description: Measures digital marketing knowledge including SEO, SEM, social media marketing, content marketing, email marketing, analytics, and campaign management.

name: Business Analysis
description: Assesses business analysis skills including requirements gathering, process modeling, stakeholder analysis, data analysis, and solution evaluation.

name: Attention to Detail Assessment
description: Measures accuracy and attention to detail through tasks involving proofreading, data comparison, error identification, and quality checking.

name: Spatial Reasoning Assessment
description: Measures the ability to visualize and manipulate 2D and 3D objects mentally. Tests spatial rotation, pattern assembly, and visualization skills.

name: Work Style Assessment
description: Evaluates workplace behavior preferences and work style including independence vs. collaboration, structure preference, pace, and adaptability to change.

name: Integrity and Reliability Assessment
description: Assesses trustworthiness, reliability, and counterproductive work behavior risk. Measures attitudes toward theft, absenteeism, rule-following, and workplace conduct.

name: Verbal Comprehension (Entry Level)
description: A simpler verbal comprehension test for entry-level and blue-collar roles. Measures basic reading comprehension, instruction following, and language understanding.

name: Numerical Comprehension (Entry Level)
description: A basic numerical ability test for operational and entry-level roles. Measures basic arithmetic, number sense, and simple data interpretation.

name: Graduate Assessment Battery
description: A comprehensive assessment battery designed for graduate recruitment. Combines cognitive ability (verbal, numerical, inductive) with personality profiling for a complete candidate picture.

name: Executive Assessment
description: A comprehensive assessment for senior leadership and executive positions. Evaluates strategic thinking, business acumen, leadership style, and executive-level decision making.

name: Retail Associate Assessment
description: Designed for retail hiring. Assesses customer orientation, sales ability, teamwork, reliability, and basic numerical skills needed for retail positions.

name: Healthcare Assessment
description: Tailored for healthcare roles. Assesses empathy, attention to detail, stress tolerance, teamwork, and compliance with healthcare protocols.

name: Supply Chain & Logistics Assessment
description: Assesses knowledge and aptitude for supply chain and logistics roles including inventory management, procurement, distribution, and process optimization.

name: Technical Support Assessment
description: Designed for IT support and help desk roles. Assesses troubleshooting skills, technical knowledge, customer communication, and ability to resolve technical issues.

name: Quality Assurance (QA) Testing
description: Measures QA and software testing skills including test case design, bug reporting, regression testing, test automation concepts, and quality processes.

name: CCAT (Criteria Cognitive Aptitude Test) Equivalent
description: A general cognitive aptitude test measuring verbal, numerical, and abstract reasoning ability. Provides an overall cognitive ability score for screening.

name: HR & Talent Management Knowledge
description: Assesses HR domain knowledge including recruitment, employee relations, compensation & benefits, performance management, and employment law basics.
